TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Senegal, title = Senegal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Senegal} }

S.FORM: Senegal Itini i 14 00 N, 14 00 W, noAfilika ko Senegal. Polong no sekalay i 196,722 sq km "saka 88 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 192,530 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 4,192 sq km " Polong i 14,320,055 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 46.80%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 43.80%, malo no roma to a sera 9.40%. siyoto O (((Dakar)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakasepat 4 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Macky Sall, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 2 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: s…ôn…ô*a…ĺ itini i ** ** n, ** ** w, no~uafi…ĺika ko~u s…ôn…ô*a…ĺ. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra *.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((…¨~…ģakar)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakas…ôpat * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i ma ¶kj sa…ĺ…ĺ, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Senegal Itini i 14 00 N, 14 00 W, noAfilika ko Senegal. Polong no sekalay i 196,722 sq km "saka 88 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 192,530 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 4,192 sq km " Polong i 14,320,055 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 46.80%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 43.80%, malo no roma to a sera 9.40%. siyoto O (((Dakar)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakasepat 4 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Macky Sall, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 2 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

" "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra *.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((…¨~…ģakar)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakas…ôpat * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i ma ¶kj sa…ĺ…ĺ, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
